search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20040` direction=inbound | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | iplocation src_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(flow_count) by src_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20040` direction=outbound | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | iplocation dest_ip | geostats globallimit=0 sum(flow_count) by dest_ip

`netflow_search_rule_20040` direction=inbound | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | eval avgbits=bytes*1000*8/t_int | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes) as sumbytes sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip dest_ip cc _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount
sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip dest_ip cc | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Num. of Flows, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name src_ip dest_ip cc "Num. of Flows" "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename exp_ip_name as Device | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename dest_ip as "Dest. IP"
| rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

`netflow_search_rule_20040` direction=outbound | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes) as sumbytes sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip dest_ip cc _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount
sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip dest_ip cc | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | sort - TrafficAmount | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Num. of Flows, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name src_ip dest_ip cc "Num. of Flows" "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" | rename exp_ip_name as Device | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename dest_ip as "Dest. IP"
| rename nfo_hostname as "NFO"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10040: Visitors by Country Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20040). This Module identifies external hosts communicating with internal (local) peers, and reports them with their geographical locations. For each local host communicating with outside world, a remote peer with most traffic from each country is reported. This Module is packaged in NFO “Security” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
